scale: Trains robot manipulation policies from Project Aria smart-glasses human demonstrations with zero robot training data; ~70% zero-shot success across 7 tasks on a Franka arm

name: Ego-PM
scale: Egocentric predictive world model that jointly forecasts future actions and video frames conditioned on hand trajectories via a latent diffusion model; tested on Ego4D, BridgeData, and RLBench

name: PEDESTRIAN
scale: 340 first-person pavement videos covering 29 urban sidewalk obstacle types, with deep-learning baselines for pedestrian-safety obstacle detection

name: DeltaDorsal
scale: Dual-stream delta encoder that uses dorsal hand-skin deformation features to improve egocentric hand pose under self-occlusion (~18% lower mean per-joint angle error)

name: Edge Episodic Memory QA
scale: On-device dual-thread MLLM pipeline (continuous video-to-text summarization plus asynchronous querying) for real-time egocentric episodic-memory QA on QAEgo4D-Closed

name: LOME
scale: Action-conditioned egocentric world model that generates photorealistic human-object interactions from an image, text, and per-frame body/hand actions, with realistic physical consequences

name: Ego-Nav Co-training
scale: Converts egocentric human walking videos into robot-action datasets and co-trains a VLA with robot demonstrations for mobile navigation (fruit-search task)

name: EXPLORE-Bench
scale: Egocentric scene-prediction benchmark over real first-person videos: predict the final scene state after long atomic-action sequences, with object, attribute, and relation annotations; large human-model gap

name: Hand2World
scale: Autoregressive egocentric world model that generates photorealistic first-person interaction video from free-space hand gestures using occlusion-invariant hand conditioning and Plucker-ray camera embeddings; best on ARCTIC, HOT3D, HOI4D

name: EgoSim
scale: Closed-loop egocentric world simulator that generates spatially consistent first-person interaction videos with explicit 3D grounding and dynamic world-state updates for multi-stage simulation and cross-embodiment transfer

name: EgoPush
scale: End-to-end egocentric multi-object non-prehensile rearrangement for mobile robots from a single first-person camera, using object-centric relative-pose latents and teacher-student RL with zero-shot sim-to-real transfer

name: MEgoHand
scale: Multimodal egocentric hand-object interaction motion generator pairing a VLM cerebrum with a flow-matching policy over a unified 3.35M RGB-D frame, 24K interaction, 1.2K object dataset

name: EgoH4
scale: Diffusion transformer that forecasts both-hand 3D trajectories and poses from egocentric video and camera pose, including out-of-frame hands; trained on Ego-Exo4D (156K train / 34K eval sequences)

name: Diff-IP2D
scale: Non-autoregressive diffusion model that jointly forecasts 2D hand trajectories and object affordances on egocentric video with explicit camera-egomotion conditioning

name: IndEgo
scale: ~197 hours of egocentric (plus ~97 hours exocentric) industrial collaborative-work video over assembly, logistics, inspection, and repair, with gaze, narration, sound, motion, hand pose, and point clouds
modalities: egocentric-video; gaze; audio; motion; hand-pose; point-cloud

name: LaMAria
scale: City-scale egocentric visual-inertial SLAM benchmark from glasses-like wearables, hours/kilometers of trajectories with centimeter-accurate surveyed ground truth and difficulty-tiered tracks (incl. night and vehicle motion)

name: EgoLifter
scale: Open-world 3D segmentation that decomposes natural egocentric video into individual 3D objects using 3D Gaussians and SAM weak supervision, with a transient module for dynamic objects (Aria Digital Twin benchmark)

name: EgoSplat
scale: Open-vocabulary egocentric scene understanding with language-embedded 3D Gaussian splatting, using SAM2-tracked multi-view instance features and an instance-aware spatio-temporal module (gains on Aria Digital Twin)

name: 3D-Aware Ego Instance Tracking
scale: 3D-aware instance segmentation and multi-object tracking in egocentric video that lifts 2D masks with scene geometry to survive rapid motion and occlusion (large ID-switch reductions on EPIC Fields)

name: EgoCogNav
scale: Cognition-aware egocentric navigation framework that forecasts human trajectory and head motion from perceived path uncertainty, modeling scanning, hesitation, and backtracking, with the 6-hour CEN dataset

name: Neck-Mounted Gaze (GLC)
scale: Transformer gaze estimator (GLC) for a shoulder-level neck-mounted camera with an out-of-bound gaze classification task and head/neck multi-view co-learning, plus a ~4-hour 8-subject dataset

name: CMU-MMAC
scale: Among the earliest egocentric datasets: a multimodal kitchen-activity database with head-mounted egocentric video plus body IMUs, motion capture, and audio for 43 subjects cooking 5 recipes

name: First-Person Social Interactions
scale: The first egocentric social-interaction dataset: day-long head-mounted video of 8 subjects at a theme park, annotated for social interactions, roles, attention, and turn-taking

name: BEOID
scale: Gaze-tracked egocentric video of 8 users interacting with objects across 6 everyday locations (kitchen, workspace, printer, corridor, gym) for discovering task-relevant objects and interaction modes

name: DreamDojo
scale: Generalist robot world model pretrained on 44K hours of egocentric human video using continuous latent actions; distilled to real-time (10.8 FPS) for teleoperation, policy evaluation, and model-based planning

name: UniDex
scale: Robot foundation suite for universal dexterous hand control learned from egocentric human videos, transferring human manipulation priors to multi-fingered robot hands

name: DexGloveHOI
scale: 100K+ synchronized egocentric vision and on-glove IMU samples with marker-based mocap ground-truth 3D hand pose across dexterous daily object manipulation (introduced with the AVI-HT vision-IMU fusion method)

name: DexWM
scale: Dexterous interaction world model that learns fine-grained hand-object manipulation from finger keypoints in 900+ hours of egocentric human and robot video, with zero-shot transfer to a Franka-Allegro hand

name: H2R
scale: Human-to-robot data augmentation that turns egocentric human videos into robot-centric training data by retargeting hand pose, inpainting human limbs, and compositing rendered robot arms for manipulation pre-training

name: HumanScale
scale: Pretraining study and recipe showing that filtered, labeled egocentric human video can outperform teleoperated real-robot data for embodied pretraining (lower action-prediction loss; large in- and out-of-distribution success gains)

name: Do as I Do
scale: Reconstructs and retargets human hand-object interactions from in-the-wild monocular RGB video into executable dexterous robot manipulation trajectories

name: EgoCS-400K
scale: 400K+ first-person Counter-Strike gameplay videos (10K hours, 1K+ matches, 40K rounds, 13 maps) with aligned actions, player state, camera motion, view direction, and game events for interactive world-model training

name: UNIEGO
scale: Unified egocentric encoder trained through hierarchical multi-teacher distillation from nine teachers across ego-exo viewpoints, RGB, depth, skeleton, and foundation-model representations

name: HT-Bench / HandTouch
scale: Dexterous full-hand tactile benchmark pairing egocentric RGB with 10M RGB frames and 7.8M tactile frames across 226 tasks, plus the HandTouch vision-tactile encoder

name: Hand-4DGS
scale: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for dynamic 4D hand reconstruction from egocentric videos, targeting fast inference around 60 FPS on H2O and ARCTIC-style capture

name: Motion-Focused Latent Action VLA
scale: Cross-embodiment VLA training recipe that extracts motion-focused latent actions from unlabeled human EgoVideos with a hybrid disentangled VQ-VAE and adapts with 50 downstream trajectories

name: VEGA / VEGA-Bench
scale: Navigation VLA method and benchmark using in-the-wild egocentric videos, monocular geometry, 250K scenes, and about 5M navigation goals for obstacle-aware trajectory supervision

name: Divide Deliberate Decide
scale: Fully local zero-shot multi-agent VLM framework for fine-grained egocentric action recognition, combining orchestrated video chunks, heterogeneous VLM specialists, peer consultation, and Borda aggregation

name: VL-MemKnG / WalkieKnowledgeT+
scale: Hybrid spatio-temporal knowledge-graph and segment-memory framework for QA over long egocentric navigation trajectories, with WalkieKnowledgeT+ for temporally distributed reasoning

name: EgoPhys
scale: Learns deformable-object physics digital twins from egocentric RGB-only interaction video using inverse-physics codebooks and an egocentric deformable-object interaction dataset

name: EPIC Efficient Egocentric Perception
scale: Algorithm-hardware co-optimization framework for smart AR glasses that uses gaze, pose, and inertial signals to retain informative high-resolution egocentric perception while reducing memory and energy cost

name: Temporal Action Graphs for Ego VLMs
scale: In-context egocentric action-recognition pipeline that converts video into dense narratives and temporal action graphs, improving few-shot reasoning on EGTEA and EPIC-KITCHENS-100 with open-weight VLMs

name: V-RAGBench / CARVE
scale: Long egocentric-video RAG benchmark and chunk-adaptive retrieval method using query, evidence-chunk, answer triplets to evaluate retrieval and generation separately

name: ReRe Cross-View Revisiting
scale: Training-free egocentric spatial-reasoning framework that revisits first-person video conclusions through synthesized complementary novel views on VSI-Bench and STI-Bench

name: EDITH
scale: Hierarchical robot-policy framework that streams first-person view, gaze, and speech from smart glasses to infer intent, produce grounded subtasks, and reduce communication burden in human-robot interaction

name: Eva-3M / EvaPose
scale: Large-scale egocentric visibility-aware human-pose dataset with over 3.0M frames and 435K keypoint-visibility annotations, plus the EvaPose visibility-aware HPE method

name: SAW-Bench
scale: Situated-awareness benchmark with 786 real-world Ray-Ban Meta smart-glasses videos and 2,071 human-annotated QA pairs probing observer-centric spatial understanding

name: ARGaze
scale: Autoregressive transformer for online egocentric gaze estimation, using current visual features and bounded recent gaze context for causal streaming inference

name: STAformer++ Affordance-Aware Anticipation
scale: Short-term object-interaction anticipation method integrating image-video attention with environment affordance memory and interaction hotspots on Ego4D and curated EPIC-KITCHENS STA labels

name: WristPP
scale: Wrist-worn wide-FOV RGB system for real-time 3D hand pose and per-vertex pressure estimation, evaluated on a 133K-frame, 20-subject pose-pressure dataset

name: Egocentric Co-Pilot
scale: Web-native neuro-symbolic smart-glasses agent framework with Temporal Chain-of-Thought, hierarchical context compression, speech/gaze intent parsing, and WebRTC/WebSocket streaming for assistive egocentric AI

name: Gazeify Then Voiceify
scale: Displayless smart-glasses interaction system for physical-object referencing through gaze selection, object masks, voice descriptions, and conversational correction

name: EGAgent
scale: Agentic very-long-video understanding framework for all-day wearable egocentric streams, using entity scene graphs, hybrid visual/audio search, and planning tools on EgoLifeQA and Video-MME Long

name: Wearable Product Localization
scale: Multimodal wearable assistive system for blind and low-vision product search, navigation, and correction, combining YOLO-World, VLM descriptions, spatialized sonification, and retrieval feedback

name: VisionClaw
scale: Always-on wearable AI-agent system on Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses that couples live egocentric perception with speech-driven OpenClaw task execution for situated hands-free actions

name: ActiveGlasses
scale: Smart-glasses active-vision system for learning robot manipulation from ego-centric human demonstrations, using a stereo head-mounted camera for collection and robot-mounted active perception at deployment

name: INSIGHT
scale: Intention-guided cognitive reasoning framework for egocentric long-term action anticipation, using hand-object cues, verb-noun dependencies, and RL-style reasoning over Ego4D, EPIC-KITCHENS-55, and EGTEA Gaze+

name: NS-iHOS / WISH
scale: Weakly supervised egocentric in-hand object segmentation from natural-language narrations, distilling narration cues into WISH for hand-object association and segmentation without narration at inference

name: Exo2Ego / Ego-ExoClip
scale: Exocentric-to-egocentric MLLM transfer with Ego-ExoClip, a 1.1M synchronized ego-exo clip-text pretraining set from Ego-Exo4D, plus EgoIT instruction tuning

name: EgoWorld
scale: Exocentric-to-egocentric generation framework that reconstructs egocentric views from point clouds, 3D hand poses, and text, evaluated on H2O, TACO, Assembly101, and Ego-Exo4D

name: Aria STDR
scale: Custom Project Aria smart-glasses scene-text detection and recognition dataset studying lighting, distance, resolution, and gaze-guided processing for egocentric OCR

name: RaycastGrasp
scale: Egocentric gaze-guided robotic manipulation interface using a wearable MR headset, augmented visual cues, pretrained vision models, and a robotic arm for object retrieval

name: Fish2Mesh
scale: Fisheye-aware transformer for 3D human mesh recovery from egocentric vision, using ego-specific position embeddings and weak supervision from third-person cameras

name: GazeLLM
scale: Gaze-focused multimodal LLM pipeline that reduces first-person video processing by routing high-resolution analysis to human attention regions while preserving task comprehension

name: LookOut / Aria Navigation Dataset
scale: Project Aria real-world humanoid egocentric navigation dataset and framework for predicting future 6D head-pose trajectories, with 4 hours of navigation recordings

name: ECHO
scale: Ego-centric HOI diffusion framework recovering human pose, object motion, and contact dynamics from sparse smart-glasses and smartwatch tracking signals

name: DMC3 Ego VideoQA
scale: Dual-modal counterfactual contrastive framework for egocentric VideoQA, constructing textual and visual counterfactual samples around events and hand-object interactions

name: Uni-Hand
scale: Universal egocentric hand motion forecasting framework for multi-modal input, 2D/3D wrist and finger waypoints, head-hand motion synergy, and downstream affordance tasks

name: SFHand / EgoHaFL
scale: Streaming language-guided 3D hand-forecasting framework plus EgoHaFL dataset with synchronized 3D hand poses and language instructions for embodied manipulation

name: OpenTouch
scale: In-the-wild egocentric full-hand tactile dataset with 5.1 hours of synchronized video-touch-pose data, 2,900 curated clips, text annotations, and retrieval/classification benchmarks

name: mmEgoHand
scale: Head-mounted egocentric hand pose and gesture-recognition system combining millimeter-wave radar and IMU to support VR interaction, skill digitization, and robotic teleoperation

name: AiGet
scale: Smart-glasses AI assistant for informal learning in everyday moments, using real-time gaze patterns, environmental context, user profiles, and LLM-generated knowledge prompts

name: Ego4o
scale: Omni-modal egocentric human motion capture and understanding framework for VR/AR headsets, smart glasses, phones, and watches with egocentric images, sparse IMUs, and motion-language descriptions

name: EgoExo-Gen
scale: Cross-view egocentric video prediction from exocentric video, first ego frame, and text instructions, using predicted hand-object interaction masks and diffusion generation

name: Reading in the Wild
scale: Project Aria smart-glasses dataset for reading recognition with 100 hours of reading and non-reading video, egocentric RGB, eye gaze, head pose, and reading-type labels

name: Ego 6DoF Object Trajectories
scale: Framework extracting 6DoF manipulation trajectories from ego/exo video datasets and generating object manipulation trajectories from action descriptions in egocentric vision, evaluated with HOT3D

name: HEADS-UP
scale: Head-mounted egocentric dataset for pedestrian trajectory prediction and collision-risk assessment in blind-assistance systems

name: Embodied VideoAgent
scale: LLM/VLM agent that builds persistent 3D scene memory from egocentric video plus embodied depth and pose sensors for dynamic scene reasoning, planning, and robot manipulation

name: SoundingActions
scale: Self-supervised audio-language-vision embedding that learns how actions sound from narrated egocentric videos using contrastive consensus over Ego4D and EPIC-Sounds

name: EgoChoir
scale: Egocentric 3D human-object interaction region model inferring 3D contact and object affordance from egocentric video, head motion, and 3D object cues

name: ObjectRelator
scale: Cross-view ego-exo object relation and correspondence model with multimodal condition fusion and self-supervised cross-view object alignment

name: HUX
scale: Heads Up eXperience always-on AI companion concept for smart glasses and XR headsets, integrating eye gaze, surrounding context, verbal context, memory storage, and task assistance

name: EgoZAR
scale: Egocentric zone-aware action-recognition method that decouples activity-centric zone priors from scene-specific appearance to improve cross-domain transfer on EPIC-KITCHENS-100 and Argo1M

name: TouchInsight
scale: Real-time mixed-reality touch and text input pipeline that detects touch moment, finger, and touch location from egocentric hand tracking on arbitrary physical surfaces

name: EffHandEgoNet
scale: Egocentric 2D hand-pose and action-recognition method for smart-glasses RGB input, including EffHandNet and EffHandEgoNet evaluated on H2O and FPHA

name: Untrimmed Action Anticipation
scale: Reframes egocentric action anticipation for untrimmed streams rather than short pre-cut observation windows

name: EgoGAN
scale: Generative model for forecasting future hand masks from egocentric video under stochastic head and hand motion

name: HOI Forecast / Interaction Hotspots
scale: Forecasts future hand trajectories and interaction hotspots on next-active objects from egocentric video

name: SOS Handled Objects
scale: Self-supervised learning over sets of handled objects to improve egocentric action recognition

name: I-CVAE LTA
scale: Intention-conditioned variational model for long-term human egocentric action forecasting; reported Ego4D LTA challenge wins

name: UmeTrack
scale: Unified multi-view end-to-end 3D hand tracking for VR headsets and hand-interaction systems

name: InternVideo-Ego4D
scale: Pack of champion Ego4D challenge solutions spanning episodic memory, forecasting, hand-object, and audio/social tracks

name: EgoT2 / Egocentric Video Task Translation
scale: Task-translation framework that uses one egocentric video task to supervise or transfer to another in wearable-video settings

name: EgoLoc
scale: Revisits Ego4D visual-query 3D object localization with stronger camera-pose estimation and localization baselines

name: NaQ
scale: Uses narrations as implicit queries to supervise episodic-memory retrieval in long egocentric video

name: Ego-Only
scale: Egocentric action-detection approach that removes reliance on exocentric pretraining transfer

name: EgoDistill
scale: Distills expensive egocentric clip features into efficient models by reconstructing heavy representations from head-motion signals

name: TransFusion
scale: Multimodal object-interaction anticipation model that summarizes past egocentric context with natural-language descriptions

name: Fine-Grained Affordance Annotation
scale: Fine-grained affordance annotation protocol for egocentric hand-object interaction videos, extending earlier EPIC/Ego4D workshop annotation work

name: Next Active Object Anticipation
scale: Anticipates next-active-object locations before contact in egocentric video

name: MINOTAUR
scale: Unified video grounding model for multimodal queries over tasks such as action detection, visual queries, and spatio-temporal language grounding

name: EgoViT
scale: Pyramid video transformer with dynamic class-token generation for egocentric action recognition

name: AV-EgoGaze Anticipation
scale: Audio-visual egocentric gaze-anticipation model using video and audio cues to forecast future attention

name: AntGPT
scale: Uses large language models to reason over common future event sequences and improve long-term action anticipation

name: Encode-Store-Retrieve
scale: Language-encoded egocentric memory pipeline for storing and retrieving human-perception events

name: EgoPoser
scale: Real-time egocentric pose estimation from sparse and intermittent HMD/controller observations

name: Helping Hands
scale: Object-aware egocentric video-recognition model using hand-object cues

name: Open-Vocabulary Egocentric Actions
scale: Open-vocabulary egocentric action-recognition framework for verb-noun action labels

name: EgoBlur
scale: Privacy-preserving blur pipeline and responsible-innovation analysis for Project Aria egocentric capture

name: POV-Surgery
scale: Egocentric surgical dataset for hand and tool pose estimation during operating-room activities

name: EgoPCA
scale: Framework for egocentric hand-object interaction understanding using hand/object-centric perception cues

name: EGOFALLS
scale: Visual-audio dataset and benchmark for fall detection using egocentric cameras

name: Ego3DPose
scale: Captures 3D body cues from binocular egocentric views for pose estimation

name: SANPO
scale: Scene understanding, accessibility, and human navigation dataset for egocentric navigation and spatial assistance

name: Egocentric Pedestrian Trajectory Benchmark
scale: Benchmarking paradigm and scale/motion-aware model for egocentric pedestrian trajectory prediction

name: Symbolic Active Object Localization
scale: Uses symbolic world knowledge to localize active objects from egocentric vision and task instructions

name: IndustReal
scale: Egocentric industrial-like procedure-step recognition dataset with execution errors

name: Aria-NeRF
scale: Multimodal egocentric view-synthesis pipeline for Project Aria-style capture using NeRF-inspired scene models

name: Egocentric Whole-Body MoCap
scale: FisheyeViT plus diffusion refinement for egocentric whole-body motion capture

name: Exo2EgoDVC
scale: Dense video captioning for egocentric procedural activities using web instructional videos as exocentric supervision

name: PALM
scale: Predicts future actions through language models for long-term action anticipation

name: LEAP
scale: LLM generation of egocentric action programs with sub-actions, preconditions, postconditions, and object references

name: Action Scene Graphs
scale: Temporally evolving action scene graphs for long-form egocentric video understanding

name: LEGO
scale: Visual-instruction-tuned model for egocentric action-frame generation

name: LifelongMemory
scale: LLM-based long-form egocentric memory system for answering queries over a camera wearer's past

name: EgoPlan-Bench
scale: Planning benchmark for multimodal large language models over egocentric human-level planning tasks

name: CaptainCook4D
scale: Procedural-activity dataset for understanding execution errors, used later in multimodal temporal-action-segmentation benchmarks

name: Get a Grip
scale: Reconstructs stable hand-object grasps from egocentric video
